summary: Delegated the rewriting of the bilingual documentation portal to SubAgent-TechWriter. The subagent successfully reframed the project positioning from an L2/L3 interceptor to a 'Multi-Agent Collaboration Framework' focusing on Low Cognitive Load and Low Invasiveness. It injected Mermaid diagrams, standard tables, and rewrote the README.md, ARCHITECTURE.md, CORE_CONCEPTS.md, and NATIVE_CAPABILITIES_ASSESSMENT.md in both English and Chinese.
